meta.title: Validated Findings
meta.desc: CRUCIBLE-validated findings with full TAPC scores, Admiralty/NATO confidence codes, and MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings. Only B1/B2 findings reach the analyst.

sqlite.query: SELECT entity, org_id, ROUND(tapc_score, 2) as tapc_score, admiralty_code, mitre_technique, kill_chain_stage, status, summary FROM findings ORDER BY tapc_score DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN admiralty_code='B1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as b1_confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN admiralty_code='B2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as b2_probable, SUM(CASE WHEN status='downgraded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as downgraded, COUNT(DISTINCT org_id) as orgs_hit, ROUND(AVG(tapc_score), 2) as avg_tapc FROM findings

compute.expr: '**' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].total) & '** findings  |  🔴 **' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].b1_confirmed) & '** B1 confirmed  |  🟠 **' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].b2_probable) & '** B2 probable  |  ⬇ **' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].downgraded) & '** downgraded  |  **' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].orgs_hit) & '** orgs  |  Avg TAPC: **' & $string(fetched_sources.finding_stats[0].avg_tapc) & '**'
